name: New Mexican Red Chile Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup New Mexico red chile powder (mild, medium or hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a medium-size saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
4. Cool before using.
